friendly_name: Guide Site, Book, and LLM Bootstrap
purpose_context: The guide's text is finished but reaches nobody: it exists only as markdown in a git repo. This mission builds the pipeline that turns that markdown into the four surfaces the project needs - a readable website for creators evaluating whether to join, a printable book for people who read on paper, machine-readable sources so an LLM can consume the guide directly, and the pack branch creators attach to their own projects as a submodule. All four are generated from the same bytes so they can never disagree. The single most important outcome is behavioural: a creator should be able to hand any LLM one URL and have it set up their workspace and start the interview.
purpose_tldr: Publish the Dungeon Master's Guide as an attractive website, a printable book, and a one-URL bootstrap any LLM can follow to start building.
